name: manifest-supersession
description: DR3-1 join, input side (design rev 5, section 5.3): two intent records for the same train subject - the fold names the latest-at record the WINNER and exposes the superseded one with its at. The Assembler fetches the winner's raw payload by this subject+at and NEVER re-selects latest itself (the Law 6 re-implementation trap). Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 3b04d45 on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the design.
